original: a rifle salvaged from the Nova’s deck 13
context: <<POS:06054825>> e.description='a rifle salvaged from the Nova’s deck 13'

original: Proudly stamped with the Bell-Isle/Grunmann logo, this rifle bears a vague similarity to the modern Reaper rifles which are a common sight on galactic front lines. It lacks any of the safety and accuracy updates today’s laser rifles have, but it packs a heavier punch.
